matrix_scope: Operational office-family distribution for world administrative thickness. The umbrella polity 'The Principalities' remains in repository canon but is not counted as a role-allocation bloc inside this matrix.

distribution.identity_anchor: road-policing, fashion, ceremonial display, civic elegance
enforcement, anti-magic control, prisoner-labor logic, fortification, covert law
giant-led quota civilization with layered industrial governance and restorative law
cold-survival research commonwealth where infrastructure maintenance is civic life
volcanic matriarchal forge polity with dense compressed legal-industrial hierarchy
mobile connective polity carrying law, diplomacy, trade, and mediation in motion

global_assumptions: The first eight polities remain mature already-defined systems and their counts do not increase.
The expansion is not more nobles but more administrative thickness.
The added mass is concentrated in offices, procedural roles, logistical bottlenecks, local authority layers, and route-depot-registry-tribunal-work-gang structure.
The world should feel administratively inhabited rather than merely named.
justification: Repository synthesis layer built to make strongly supported canon operational without overriding source truth.
